content:
@sigil v0 hybrid
G: fix_timestamp_skew
C: abs_diff>"300" ∧ rejects_valid ∧ provider_skew_unhandled
P: loosen_window ∧ skew_aware_check ∧ avoid_"401"_false_pos

[AUDIT]
Goal: fix_timestamp_skew.
Constraints: abs_diff>"300" and rejects_valid and provider_skew_unhandled.
Plan: loosen_window and skew_aware_check and avoid_"401"_false_pos.

@sigil v0 hybrid
G: fix_grace_boundary
C: overdue⇒"402" ∧ grace_window="24h" ∧ block_charge_loop
P: check_grace_elapsed ∧ emit_"402"_once ∧ halt_retry_chain
V: grace_"24h"_encoded ∧ single_"402"_response
A: min_fix_applied ∧ reg_test_boundary

[AUDIT]
Goal: fix_grace_boundary.
Constraints: overdue implies "402" and grace_window="24h" and block_charge_loop.
Plan: check_grace_elapsed and emit_"402"_once and halt_retry_chain.
Verify: grace_"24h"_encoded and single_"402"_response.
Answer target: min_fix_applied and reg_test_boundary.

G: capsule_micro_arch
C: team_of_"9" ∧ ddl_"12 weeks" ∧ store_"PostgreSQL" ∧ compliance_ready_split
P: modular_services ∧ "PostgreSQL"_shared_store ∧ platform_plus_sec_ops ∧ steady_traffic_sizing
V: "12 weeks"_fits_3_sprints ∧ "9"_devs_own_modules ∧ "PostgreSQL"_reduces_ops_risk
A: default_arch_monorepo_microservices ∧ short_why_team_size_plus_deadline_drove_choice

G: ship_capsule_mvp
C: team_of_"6" ∧ deadline_"9 weeks" ∧ store_"PostgreSQL" ∧ async_enrichment
P: worker_sidecar ∧ pt_mlops ∧ default_arch ∧ queue_backed_writes
V: "PostgreSQL" ∧ "9 weeks" ∧ "6"
A: default_arch ∧ short_why

@sigil v0 hybrid
G: path_traversal_risk
P: validate_path ∧ strip_traversal ∧ allowlist_check
V: "download" ∧ safe_base_confirmed
A: reject_dotdot ∧ sanitize_file_param

[AUDIT]
Goal: path_traversal_risk.
Plan: validate_path and strip_traversal and allowlist_check.
Verify: "download" and safe_base_confirmed.
Answer target: reject_dotdot and sanitize_file_param.

@sigil v0 hybrid
G: sql_injection_risk
C: unsanitized_input ∧ "sort" ∧ "SELECT" ∧ concat_danger
P: invoice_admin_api ∧ query_param ∧ arbitrary_order_clause
V: allowlist_sort ∧ reject_unknown_fields

[AUDIT]
Goal: sql_injection_risk.
Constraints: unsanitized_input and "sort" and "SELECT" and concat_danger.
Plan: invoice_admin_api and query_param and arbitrary_order_clause.
Verify: allowlist_sort and reject_unknown_fields.

@sigil v0 hybrid
G: refactor_reconcileBatch
C: "async" ∧ "await" ∧ minimal_change
P: load_batch ∧ db.fetchRows ∧ apply_rules ∧ db.save ∧ emit_metrics
V: "await" ∧ "next(err)" ∧ async_await

[AUDIT]
Goal: refactor_reconcileBatch.
Constraints: "async" and "await" and minimal_change.
Plan: load_batch and db.fetchRows and apply_rules and db.save and emit_metrics.
Verify: "await" and "next(err)" and async/await.

@sigil v0 hybrid
G: refactor_loadGatewayUser
C: "async" ∧ "await" ∧ minimal_change
P: session_check ∧ db.findUser ∧ flags.load ∧ audit.log
V: "next(err)" ∧ db_err

[AUDIT]
Goal: refactor_loadGatewayUser.
Constraints: "async" and "await" and minimal_change.
Plan: session_check and db.findUser and flags.load and audit.log.
Verify: "next(err)" and db_err.
